instruction: Write a Common Lisp macro `bind-vars` that takes a list of (name value-form) bindings and a body. The bindings are PARALLEL — every value-form is evaluated in the SAME outer environment, so no binding's value-form can see another binding from the same form. Expansion uses LET. Pairs with `bind-vars-star` (sequential, uses LET*) — be careful which one is asked for.
